success.description: You engage in a test of will with the target... and win! You influence the target

As above, and you may add to this card a number of recharge tokens equal to the number of you have scored. While this card is recharging, your target may not target you with any actions, unless you target him first

boon.description: You may recover 1 stress or inflict 1 stress on your target

bane.description: Move the Party Tension meter 2 spaces to the right, you boring, frustrating ignoramus
